linux-gfx90a.blocked_reason: Session 4 (fork d326818, new commit on top of 1e28c83): the dominant A' read/value-type class is SOLVED via a thrust/tuple.h compat shadow giving the classic null-padded value-type tuple an implicit conversion to / assignment from cuda::std::tuple over its non-null prefix (SFINAE-bounded by tuple_size so nested tuple-of-tuples never overruns tuple_element). This cleared the rocPRIM block_load is_convertible static_assert and the reduce_by_key write-back that gated most prims: sssp/pagerank/bfs/wcc/core_number/betweenness/common_methods/refine/edge_triangle_count now compile (v32+v64). SG library dropped from ~44 failing library TUs to 16 (8 SG primitives x v32/v64). Round 4 had begun option (b) (zip_iterator_base.h shadow) but never created it; this session fell through to option (a) and it yielded. Also applied: is_equivalent_value_type at 5 property-view static_asserts (round 4 did 1); equivalent-value_t ctors on the endpoint device-view + kv_binary_search_store_view; is_arithmetic_or_thrust_tuple_of_arithmetic for classic tuple; classic-tuple vs cuda::std::tuple operator==/!= for thrust::remove's placeholder predicate; device-lambda constexpr captures (sssp/core_number/betweenness); key_store dependent-template keyword. REMAINING (gates the libcugraph.so LINK, so no GPU validation yet -- kept blocked, no false-port): 16 TUs = od_shortest_distances, strongly_connected_components, random_walks, sample_edges, temporal_sample_edges, gather_one_hop, lookup_src_dst, erdos_renyi_generator (NONE are BFS/SSSP/PageRank, but one .so). Their sub-classes are now narrow/mechanical: proclaim_return_type exact-match (od_shortest), rocPRIM device_merge key convertibility (scc), double->int braced-init narrowing in sample_and_compute_local_nbr_indices, and a few functor tuple-arg templates + kv_store asserts. notes.md Session 4 has the exact sites. DO NOT defer the 8 from cmake casually: neighbor_sampling depends on sample_edges/gather_one_hop, so excision cascades into the sampling subsystem -- finish the 8 instead. All USE_HIP-guarded, CUDA byte-identical, multi-arch, zero-regression.
